---
title: ""
number-sections: false
---

# Why This Part Matters

Modern AI systems are built in Python.

But Python is not the goal.

The goal is to think in abstractions.

---

# Learning Outcomes

By the end of this part, you will:

- Think in modular systems
- Design reusable components
- Handle data pipelines
- Prepare for ML systems

---

# Chapters in This Part

1. The AI Engineer Mindset  
2. Python Execution Model  
3. Loops and Iteration
4. Data Structures & Complexity for AI
5. NumPy for AI Engineers  
6. Pandas for AI Engineers  
7. Guided Practice Notebooks
